privileged_info_summary: Taft Elementary School is a real public school located at 4040 SE High School Drive, Lincoln City, OR 97367, in Lincoln County. The school currently serves 458 students in grades 3-6. The correct contact phone number is 541-996-2136 (not 996-1135 as claimed). The current principal is Leslie Roache (starting 2025-26 school year), not Jennifer Woolsey. The school's geographic coordinates are approximately 44.9582, -124.0179 (very close to the claimed 44.9573, -124.0128).
